help.short: Name of the domain under the profile which is unique globally.
Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.

command.name: delete
command.confirmation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?

help.short: Name of the domain under the profile which is unique globally.
Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.

command.name: create

help.short: Name of the domain under the profile which is unique globally
Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.
ID of the Azure DNS zone.

command.argGroup:
<arg type="array" var="$customDomain.properties.mtlsSettings.ClientCertificateRequiredAndValidated.allowedFqdns" options="allowed-fqdns">
<arg type="array" var="$customDomain.properties.mtlsSettings.ClientCertificateRequiredAndValidated.secrets" options="secrets" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="$customDomain.properties.mtlsSettings.ClientCertificateValidatedIfPresented.allowedFqdns" options="allowed-fqdns">
<arg type="array<@ResourceReference_create>" var="$customDomain.properties.mtlsSettings.ClientCertificateValidatedIfPresented.secrets" options="secrets" required="True">

help.short: Resource reference to the secret. ie. subs/rg/profile/secret

command.name: update

help.short: Name of the domain under the profile which is unique globally.
Name of the Azure Front Door Standard or Azure Front Door Premium profile which is unique within the resource group.
ID of the Azure DNS zone.

command.argGroup:
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$customDomain.properties.mtlsSettings.ClientCertificateRequiredAndValidated.allowedFqdns" options="allowed-fqdns">
<arg type="array" var="$customDomain.properties.mtlsSettings.ClientCertificateRequiredAndValidated.secrets" options="secrets">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$customDomain.properties.mtlsSettings.ClientCertificateValidatedIfPresented.allowedFqdns" options="allowed-fqdns">
<arg type="array<@ResourceReference_update>" var="$customDomain.properties.mtlsSettings.ClientCertificateValidatedIfPresented.secrets" options="secrets">

help.short: Resource reference to the secret. ie. subs/rg/profile/secret

command.argGroup:
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$customDomain.properties.tlsSettings.customizedCipherSuiteSet.cipherSuiteSetForTls12" options="cipher-suite-set-for-tls12">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$customDomain.properties.tlsSettings.customizedCipherSuiteSet.cipherSuiteSetForTls13" options="cipher-suite-set-for-tls13">
